name: Ancestral Sequence Reconstruction
description: Reconstruct ancestral protein or DNA sequences from modern sequences. Automatically aligns unaligned sequences with MAFFT. Build phylogenetic tree with maximum likelihood using IQ-TREE. Output probability estimates for each ancestral position.
capabilities: Reconstruct ancestral protein or DNA sequences from modern sequences
Automatically aligns unaligned sequences with MAFFT
Build phylogenetic tree with maximum likelihood using IQ-TREE
Output probability estimates for each ancestral position

sequences.description: FASTA file with modern protein or DNA sequences for ancestral reconstruction
